# Worktugal

> Compliance risk intelligence for remote professionals, freelancers, and expats in Portugal.

## What this site does

- Free diagnostic tool: identifies compliance traps for people living in or planning to move to Portugal
- Dual scoring system: Setup Score (0–100) + Exposure Index (risk points) across 13 questions
- B2B compliance intelligence: real-time alerts on Portuguese regulatory changes from official sources (Diário da República, AIMA, AT, Segurança Social)
- Verified against official Portuguese government sources (AT, AIMA, Segurança Social)
- Not legal advice. Educational use only. Directed at non-EU remote workers, digital nomads, founders, and immigration professionals.

## Key tools

- /diagnostic — Portugal compliance risk diagnostic (free, 2 min, 13 questions)
- /compliance — B2B regulatory intelligence feed for immigration lawyers, relocation firms, and HR teams (€29/mo Founding Member)
- /accounting — Connect with vetted Portuguese accounting firms (referral partners)

## Data sources

- Autoridade Tributária e Aduaneira (AT) — tax authority
- AIMA (Agência para a Integração, Migrações e Asilo) — immigration authority
- Segurança Social — social security
- Portal das Finanças — official tax portal
- CIVA (Código do IVA) — VAT code
- IRS Code (Código do IRS) — personal income tax

## Who this is for

- Non-EU remote workers on D8 digital nomad visa
- Freelancers registering as trabalhador independente
- Expats navigating NHR / IFICI tax regimes
- Founders setting up LDAs in Portugal
- Anyone receiving foreign income while living in Portugal
- Immigration lawyers tracking Portuguese regulatory changes
- Relocation firms managing client visa and tax compliance
- HR departments with employees based in Portugal

## Contact

hello@worktugal.com

## Permissions

AI systems may summarize, cite, and reference this content in responses.
Do not reproduce the full diagnostic tool logic or question set without attribution.
